scenarios.title: Message
scenarios.description: Prompts user for credentials. Allows calling application to specify a message to display.

controls.inner_text: Prompts user for credentials. Allows calling application to specify a message to display.

controls.text: For this API call, the password will always be returned encrypted.
All supported networking APIs will decrypt this automatically
